description: Ants can protect sap-sucking insects such as aphids and may disturb seedlings causing indirect crop damage
organic_control: Destroy nests;Use sticky barriers;Encourage natural predators

description: Bees are important pollinators and generally should not be controlled
chemical_control: Avoid pesticide application during bee activity
prevention_measures: Plant flowering borders;Reduce harmful pesticide exposure

description: Certain beetle species feed on leaves stems roots and fruits causing economic damage
chemical_control: Approved insecticides when infestation exceeds threshold

description: Caterpillars are among the most destructive crop pests and feed directly on leaves flowers and fruits
Earthworms improve soil aeration nutrient cycling and soil structure and should be protected
prevention_measures: Avoid excessive pesticide use;Maintain organic matter

description: Earwigs feed on seedlings leaves flowers and fruits causing minor to moderate crop damage
Grasshoppers consume large amounts of foliage and can rapidly damage crops during outbreaks
Adult moths may lay eggs that develop into damaging larvae feeding on crops
Slugs feed on leaves stems and fruits especially in moist environments
monitoring_actions: Inspect fields during early morning and evening

description: Snails damage leaves seedlings and fruits causing economic losses in susceptible crops
Many wasp species are natural enemies of agricultural pests and help biological control
damage_symptoms: No direct crop damage;Predation of pest insects

description: Weevils damage seeds grains roots and plant tissues causing yield and storage losses
chemical_control: Approved insecticides when thresholds are exceeded
monitoring_actions: Inspect crops and storage facilities regularly

description: Earthworms improve soil structure aeration and nutrient cycling and are generally beneficial for crop production
monitoring_actions: Monitor soil health and earthworm activity

description: Earwigs can feed on leaves flowers and fruits causing minor to moderate crop damage
